en: "Beware of practicing your righteousness before other people in order to be seen by them, for then you will have no reward from your Father who is in heaven.
zh: “你們小心，不要在眾人面前行你們的義，讓他們看見；如果這樣，就得不到你們天父的賞賜。

en: "Thus, when you give to the needy, sound no trumpet before you, as the hypocrites do in the synagogues and in the streets, that they may be praised by others. Truly, I say to you, they have received their reward.
zh: 因此你施捨的時候，不可到處張揚，好像偽君子在會堂和街上所作的一樣，以博取眾人的稱讚。我實在告訴你們，他們已經得了他們的賞賜。

en: But when you give to the needy, do not let your left hand know what your right hand is doing,
zh: 你施捨的時候，不要讓左手知道右手所作的，

en: so that your giving may be in secret. And your Father who sees in secret will reward you.
zh: 好使你的施捨是在隱密中行的。你父在隱密中察看，必定報答你。

en: "And when you pray, you must not be like the hypocrites. For they love to stand and pray in the synagogues and at the street corners, that they may be seen by others. Truly, I say to you, they have received their reward.
zh: “你們祈禱的時候，不可像偽君子；他們喜歡在會堂和路口站著祈禱，好讓人看見。我實在告訴你們，他們已經得了他們的賞賜。

en: But when you pray, go into your room and shut the door and pray to your Father who is in secret. And your Father who sees in secret will reward you.
zh: 但你祈禱的時候，要進到密室裡去，關上門，向在隱密中的父祈禱。你父在隱密中察看，必定報答你。

en: "And when you pray, do not heap up empty phrases as the Gentiles do, for they think that they will be heard for their many words.
zh: 你們祈禱的時候，不可重複無意義的話，像教外人一樣，他們以為話多了就蒙垂聽。

en: Do not be like them, for your Father knows what you need before you ask him.
zh: 你們不可像他們，因為在你們祈求以先，你們的父已經知道你們的需要了。

en: Pray then like this: "Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name.
zh: 所以你們要這樣祈禱： ‘我們在天上的父， 願你的名被尊為聖，

en: Your kingdom come, your will be done, on earth as it is in heaven.
zh: 願你的國降臨， 願你的旨意成就在地上， 如同在天上一樣。

en: Give us this day our daily bread,
zh: 我們每天所需的食物， 求你今天賜給我們；

en: and forgive us our debts, as we also have forgiven our debtors.
zh: 赦免我們的罪債， 好像我們饒恕了得罪我們的人；

en: And lead us not into temptation, but deliver us from evil.
zh: 不要讓我們陷入試探， 救我們脫離那惡者。’

en: For if you forgive others their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you,
zh: 如果你們饒恕別人的過犯，你們的天父也必饒恕你們。

en: but if you do not forgive others their trespasses, neither will your Father forgive your trespasses.
zh: 如果你們不饒恕別人，你們的父也必不饒恕你們的過犯。

en: "And when you fast, do not look gloomy like the hypocrites, for they disfigure their faces that their fasting may be seen by others. Truly, I say to you, they have received their reward.
zh: “你們禁食的時候，不可像偽君子那樣愁眉苦臉，他們裝成難看的樣子，叫人看出他們在禁食。我實在告訴你們，他們已經得了他們的賞賜。

en: But when you fast, anoint your head and wash your face,
zh: 可是你禁食的時候，要梳頭洗臉，

en: that your fasting may not be seen by others but by your Father who is in secret. And your Father who sees in secret will reward you.
zh: 不要叫人看出你在禁食，只讓在隱密中的父看見。你父在隱密中察看，必定報答你。

en: "Do not lay up for yourselves treasures on earth, where moth and rust destroy and where thieves break in and steal,
zh: “不可為自己在地上積聚財寶，因為地上有蟲蛀，有鏽侵蝕，也有賊挖洞來偷。

en: but lay up for yourselves treasures in heaven, where neither moth nor rust destroys and where thieves do not break in and steal.
zh: 要為自己積聚財寶在天上，那裡沒有蟲蛀鏽蝕，也沒有賊挖洞來偷。

en: For where your treasure is, there your heart will be also.
zh: 你的財寶在哪裡，你的心也在哪裡。

en: "The eye is the lamp of the body. So, if your eye is healthy, your whole body will be full of light,
zh: “眼睛就是身體的燈。如果你的眼睛健全，全身就都明亮；

en: but if your eye is bad, your whole body will be full of darkness. If then the light in you is darkness, how great is the darkness!
zh: 如果你的眼睛有毛病，全身就都黑暗。如果你裡面的光變成黑暗，這是多麼的黑暗！

en: "No one can serve two masters, for either he will hate the one and love the other, or he will be devoted to the one and despise the other. You cannot serve God and money.
zh: “一個人不能服事兩個主人；他若不是恨這個愛那個，就是忠於這個輕視那個。你們不能服事 神，又服事金錢 。

en: "Therefore I tell you, do not be anxious about your life, what you will eat or what you will drink, nor about your body, what you will put on. Is not life more than food, and the body more than clothing?
zh: 所以我告訴你們，不要為生命憂慮吃甚麼喝甚麼，也不要為身體憂慮穿甚麼。難道生命不比食物重要嗎？身體不比衣服重要嗎？

en: Look at the birds of the air: they neither sow nor reap nor gather into barns, and yet your heavenly Father feeds them. Are you not of more value than they?
zh: 你們看天空的飛鳥：牠們不撒種，不收割，也不收進倉裡，你們的天父尚且養活牠們；難道你們不比牠們更寶貴嗎？

en: And which of you by being anxious can add a single hour to his span of life?
zh: 你們中間誰能用憂慮使自己的壽命延長一刻呢？

en: And why are you anxious about clothing? Consider the lilies of the field, how they grow: they neither toil nor spin,
zh: 何必為衣服憂慮呢？試想田野的百合花怎樣生長，它們不勞苦，也不紡織。

en: yet I tell you, even Solomon in all his glory was not arrayed like one of these.
zh: 但我告訴你們，就是所羅門最威榮的時候所穿的，也比不上這花中的一朵。

en: But if God so clothes the grass of the field, which today is alive and tomorrow is thrown into the oven, will he not much more clothe you, O you of little faith?
zh: 田野的草，今天還在，明天就投進爐裡， 神尚且這樣妝扮它們；小信的人哪，何況你們呢？

en: Therefore do not be anxious, saying, 'What shall we eat?' or 'What shall we drink?' or 'What shall we wear?'
zh: 所以不要憂慮，說：‘我們該吃甚麼？喝甚麼？穿甚麼？’

en: For the Gentiles seek after all these things, and your heavenly Father knows that you need them all.
zh: 這些都是教外人所尋求的，你們的天父原知道你們需要這一切。

en: But seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you.
zh: 你們要先求他的國和他的義，這一切都必加給你們。

en: "Therefore do not be anxious about tomorrow, for tomorrow will be anxious for itself. Sufficient for the day is its own trouble.
zh: 所以不要為明天憂慮，因為明天自有明天的憂慮，一天的難處一天當就夠了。”
